title: helipterum corymbosum
intro: Helipterum corymbosum, also known as the Everlasting daisy, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern region of Western Australia. It is a shrub-like plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Helipterum corymbosum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal purposes, and it has been studied for its potential in developing new treatments for various health conditions.
